omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We may receive information about you from third-party analytics providers, such as Amplitude, Firebase, Appsflyer, Facebook SDK, and Apphud. This information may include usage details, geographic location, and demographic information.

We use the OpenAI GPT API to enhance the features within the app. This means that the food photos, calorie tracking requests, and nutritional queries you input into the app may be processed by the GPT API to provide you with accurate calorie, macro, and health score calculations.

We may also collect data in a form that does not, on its own, permit direct association with any specific individual. We may collect, use, transfer, and disclose non-personal information for any purpose. This information includes, but is not limited to, task name, task date and time, category etc.
